specific_location: 9 miles nortwest of New Castle on Main Elk Creek ... 4848 Road 243
description: black with white wing bars and outside tail feathers, and with a prominent scarlet red belly extending part way up the breast ... warbler bill ... similar in size to a goldfinchBehaviors: perched on metal railing under my feeder for about 30 seconds and watched the goldfinches and chickadees feed before flying off up the valley to the northCall: did not hear the birdPlumage: unknown
